scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix et-super-agent/backend --include=dev && npm install --prefix et-super-agent/frontend --include=dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd et-super-agent/backend && npm run dev" "cd et-super-agent/frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm --prefix et-super-agent/backend run build && npm --prefix et-super-agent/frontend run build
